title: Our Love Story
content:
He was my student during my internship, seated by the window with sunlight resting on his quiet smile.

What started as simple lessons and after-class questions slowly turned into shared laughter and lingering glances.

Somewhere between lectures and campus hallways, we found something sweeter than we ever planned — each other. 💗
